common.tagline: Strategic Web Agency · Automation · Applied AI · Architecture
common.siteDescription: Mark Systems builds strategic websites, business automation systems, and custom AI tools for companies that want digital assets that convert and operate.

hero.description: We design strategic websites, business workflow automation, and custom AI systems — from the landing page that captures leads to the pipeline that runs your operations. Built in Quebec, deployed everywhere.

servicesSection.label: What We Build
servicesSection.title: From Website to Full Automation
servicesSection.description: Strategic digital assets — websites, business automations, and AI systems — designed to convert, operate, and scale.

servicesPage.label: Our Services
servicesPage.title: Engineering That Delivers
servicesPage.description: Every service is grounded in production experience — sites deployed, workflows running, AI systems live. No demos, no prototypes.

fullstack-development.title: Strategic Websites
fullstack-development.shortDescription: Landing pages, showcase sites, and bilingual websites — Next.js 15+, TypeScript strict, Tailwind, App Router. Built to convert and perform.
fullstack-development.longDescription: We build professional websites that are also conversion assets: targeted landing pages, custom showcase sites, FR/EN bilingual sites with next-intl, and sites with blogs or interactive calculators. Modern stack (Next.js 15+ App Router, strict TypeScript, Tailwind CSS), solid technical SEO, security headers, Law 25 compliance, and Vercel deployment included.

ai-workflow-automation.title: Automation & Integrations
ai-workflow-automation.shortDescription: Production n8n workflows, automated onboarding, lead pipelines, and custom integrations for your operations.
ai-workflow-automation.longDescription: We automate your recurring operations: client onboarding, reminders, prospect qualification, tool synchronization, report generation, and internal alerts. Each automation is built on reliable components (n8n, Make, webhooks, REST APIs) with error handling, audit trails, and human checkpoints when needed.

ai-systems-architecture.title: Architecture & Technical Consulting
ai-systems-architecture.shortDescription: Stack scoping, technical audits, roadmaps, and strategic consulting for digital projects that require rigor and clarity.
ai-systems-architecture.longDescription: Before writing a line of code, we structure. We offer scoping workshops, stack audits, performance and security diagnostics, and prioritized recommendations. For growing teams that need a senior perspective on their architecture or development plan.

industrial-automation.title: Field Expertise — Industrial Engineering
industrial-automation.shortDescription: 10+ years in industrial electrical engineering: PLC/CNC, production lines, power grid protection. Battle-tested rigor.
industrial-automation.longDescription: Mark Systems' expertise is not theoretical. 10+ years of field commissioning: PLC and CNC programming and startup, complex production line design (defense-sector clients included), and HV/MV/LV power grid protection and coordination system engineering. This field-tested rigor informs every project we deliver.

iot-smart-home.title: Maintenance & Monthly Support
iot-smart-home.shortDescription: Scalable maintenance plans — monitoring, updates, routine modifications, analytics reports, and continuous recommendations.
iot-smart-home.longDescription: We don't deliver and disappear. Our maintenance plans cover site monitoring, technical updates, routine modifications, analytics reports, and continuous improvement recommendations. From light support to a monthly development partnership — based on your needs and growth pace.

custom-ai-tools.title: Applied AI & Business Assistants
custom-ai-tools.shortDescription: AI chatbots, business assistants, RAG knowledge bases, and document processing — integrated into your existing tools.
custom-ai-tools.longDescription: We integrate AI where it creates real value: an assistant that answers your clients' questions, a knowledge base built on your internal documents, a prospect qualification system powered by an LLM. Vendor-agnostic (OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, Ollama) — your data, your rules, zero dependency.

projectsSection.label: Case Studies
projectsSection.title: Built, Deployed, Measured
projectsSection.description: Real projects with real metrics — not demos, not prototypes.

projectsPage.label: Case Studies
projectsPage.title: Production Systems, Proven Results
projectsPage.description: Every project below runs in production. The code exists, the metrics are real, the systems are live.
projectsPage.disclaimer: Internal projects and technical demos — built and maintained by Mark Systems.

ainova-os.title: AINOVA OS
ainova-os.challenge: Existing AI agent frameworks are prototyping tools — they lack convergence guarantees, enterprise security, and production-grade orchestration for complex multi-agent workflows.
ainova-os.solution: Engineered a full AI operating system: 35+ specialized agents, a self-optimizing SOIC convergence engine with mathematical proof, Tree-of-Thoughts decision exploration, BMAD methodology integration, and MCP bridges for Claude Code — deployed on Kubernetes with Prometheus monitoring.
ainova-os.result: 84,000+ lines of production Python. Quality convergence μ = 9.94/10 (Gold Master certified). 1,030+ test functions. Fully containerized with Docker and Kubernetes manifests.

winterpulse.title: WinterPulse 2026
winterpulse.clientSize: Editorial showcase project — coverage of the Milano Cortina 2026 Winter Olympics
winterpulse.methodology: Next.js App Router + Ice & Summit design system
winterpulse.challenge: Deliver a reliable platform on a tight timeline to cover the 2026 Winter Olympics (Milano Cortina), with clear navigation across disciplines, athletes, venues, and schedule while keeping a smooth experience on mobile and desktop.
winterpulse.solution: Designed and shipped a Next.js 14 application with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Implemented fuzzy search (Fuse.js), an interactive Leaflet venue map, a competition schedule, and detailed athlete pages, all within the Ice & Summit design system.
winterpulse.result: Production-ready WinterPulse 2026 platform: 16 disciplines covered, 115 events indexed, 9 venues mapped, instant search, and 51 unit/integration tests. Lighthouse performance remained at 95+ on key pages.

n8n-ecosystem.title: n8n Automation Ecosystem
n8n-ecosystem.challenge: Managing disparate business operations — CRM, finance, documents, communications, IoT — across 14+ functional domains with no unified automation layer.
n8n-ecosystem.solution: Designed and deployed 195 production workflows on n8n: 52 AI-powered (RAG, agents, classifiers), 24 communication automations, 18 document processing pipelines, 17 finance workflows, 16 voice pipelines (Whisper + Piper), and 7 IoT orchestrations. Governance framework scored 9.90/10 on SOIC audit.
n8n-ecosystem.result: 195 workflows in production. 57% AI-powered. 12 custom community nodes installed. Complete governance with 35+ metadata fields per workflow.

osiris-scanner.title: OSIRIS Scanner
osiris-scanner.challenge: Systematically assess the security posture, performance, and resilience of websites — existing tools provide partial scores without a unified vision or global scoring.
osiris-scanner.solution: Engineered a 4-axis audit scanner: Performance (20%), Security (30%), Intrusion (30%), Resources (20%). Integrates Lighthouse and Mozilla Observatory, analyzes 110+ known trackers, detects common vulnerabilities. Calibrated grade system: Exemplary / Compliant / At Risk / Critical.
osiris-scanner.result: Operational scanner with 4 weighted axes. 110+ trackers in blocklist. Detailed reports with Rich CLI interface. Grades calibrated on real-world data. Scan time < 60s per site.

stark-portfolio.title: Immersive 3D Portfolio
stark-portfolio.challenge: Standard portfolio sites blend into the noise. The client needed a site that demonstrates technical mastery through the experience itself — not just screenshots.
stark-portfolio.solution: Built a cinematic portfolio with React 19, Three.js (3D Arc Reactor with WebGL shaders), Framer Motion animations, Howler.js procedural audio (6 interactive sounds), and a full 'Overclock Mode' that transforms the entire UI in real time.
stark-portfolio.result: Live on Netlify. 373KB gzipped JS bundle. 10 complete sections. Real-time 3D rendering with mode transformation. 7-second build time on CI/CD.

about.missionTitle: Digital Assets That Work for You
about.mission: Mark Systems exists to turn your digital needs into systems that deliver measurable results. Not demos — websites that convert, automations that run, and AI tools that solve real problems. Built by an engineer with 10+ years of field experience, every solution is designed for the real world.
about.teamDescription: One engineer. 10+ years in the field. From industrial production lines to strategic web systems.
about.valuesDescription: Four non-negotiable principles that define every engagement.

founder.name: Marc-André Roy, ing.
founder.bio: Senior electrical engineer (OIQ) with 10+ years in industrial automation — PLC/CNC, defense-sector production lines, HV power grid protection. Founder of Mark Systems, a strategic web agency specializing in Next.js 15+ sites, business automation, and applied AI for Quebec and Canadian SMBs.

0.title: Precision Over Hype
0.description: We ship measurable results, not promises. Every site is benchmarked, every automation validated before delivery — no buzzwords, no magic, just engineering.

1.title: Systems Thinking
1.description: Every component is designed for the whole. We build solutions that integrate into your existing infrastructure — not isolated prototypes that break on contact with reality.

2.title: Battle-Tested Rigor
2.description: 10+ years of industrial field experience means we build for failure modes, not just happy paths. That rigor applies to every site and system we deliver.

3.title: Your Data, Your Rules
3.description: Multi-LLM, open-source first, zero lock-in. Your systems run on your terms — we build abstraction layers, not vendor dependencies.

brief.title: Project Brief — Describe Your Needs
brief.description: Start your web project with Mark Systems. Quick and structured brief form.

0.question: What is Mark Systems?
0.answer: Mark Systems is a strategic web agency based in Quebec, specializing in website creation (Next.js 15+, TypeScript), business automation, and applied AI for Quebec and Canadian SMBs. We have no affiliation with ECI Mark Systems, a residential construction ERP software provider.

1.question: What types of websites do you build?
1.answer: We build conversion landing pages, custom showcase sites (4–6 pages), bilingual FR/EN sites, and sites with blogs or interactive calculators — all built on Next.js 15+ App Router, strict TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, deployed on Vercel with technical SEO and Law 25 compliance included.

2.question: What's included in a website package?
2.answer: All our packages include: custom design (palette, typography, components), responsive development (mobile/tablet/desktop), basic technical SEO, deployment with SSL, and up to 3 revision rounds per phase. Interactive modules (booking, calculator, AI chatbot) are available as add-ons.

3.question: Do you offer maintenance after launch?
3.answer: Yes. We offer monthly maintenance plans covering monitoring, technical updates, routine modifications, analytics reports, and continuous improvement recommendations — from light support to a monthly development partnership.

4.question: What types of automation do you offer?
4.answer: We automate recurring operations: client onboarding, lead qualification and pipeline, automated reminders, lightweight CRM (Notion, Sheets, Airtable), tool synchronization, and report generation. We primarily work with n8n and Make, integrated into your existing tools.

5.question: What does applied AI mean concretely?
5.answer: Applied AI means tools that solve a specific problem: an AI assistant that answers your clients' questions, a knowledge base built from your internal documents, or an LLM-powered prospect qualification system. We work with OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, and open-source models depending on your needs.

6.question: Do you work with clients outside Quebec?
6.answer: Yes, we operate remote-first and serve clients across Canada and internationally. Our expertise in web development, automation, and AI is available regardless of your location.

7.question: How do I start a project with Mark Systems?
7.answer: With a free 15–30 min discovery call to scope your needs. We then propose a detailed quote with phases and deliverables. We require a 50% deposit to start and the balance on delivery.

8.question: How much does a website or automation project cost?
8.answer: Showcase websites start at $2,500, conversion landing pages from $1,200, n8n automations from $1,500. Every project is custom-quoted after the discovery call. We also offer maintenance plans starting at $250/month. Financing available through Quebec's ESSOR program.

hero.subtitle: Production AI Operating System
hero.description: 35+ specialized agents, a self-optimizing convergence engine, and enterprise-grade infrastructure — engineered for teams that need AI they can trust in production.

overview.label: The Problem & Solution
overview.title: Why AiNova OS Exists
problemPoints: AI agent frameworks are prototyping tools, not production systems
No convergence guarantees — outputs vary unpredictably
Security is an afterthought, not a design principle
Scaling from demo to enterprise requires a complete rewrite
solutionPoints: Purpose-built AI operating system with 35+ specialized agents
SOIC convergence engine with mathematical proof (μ=9.94/10)
Enterprise security baked in from day one

soic.title: SOIC Convergence Engine
soic.description: Self-Optimizing Intelligence Convergence — mathematically proven quality convergence across 9 dimensions with μ=9.94/10 Gold Master certification.

tot.title: Tree-of-Thoughts
tot.description: Advanced decision exploration that evaluates multiple reasoning paths simultaneously, selecting optimal solutions through structured deliberation.

agents.title: 35+ Specialized Agents
agents.description: Purpose-built agents for every function — from code generation and testing to security auditing and documentation — orchestrated by a central coordinator.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Role-based access control, audit trails, input validation, and sandboxed execution — security is a design principle, not a patch.

multi-llm.title: Multi-LLM Architecture
multi-llm.description: Vendor-agnostic design supporting OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, and Ollama — intelligent routing based on cost, latency, and capability.

k8s.title: Kubernetes Native
k8s.description: Docker-containerized with Kubernetes manifests, Prometheus monitoring, and Grafana dashboards — built for horizontal scaling from day one.

api.title: API Gateway

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Mark Systems Privacy Policy — compliant with Quebec Law 25 on the protection of personal information.
privacy.intro: Mark Systems is committed to protecting personal information in accordance with Quebec Law 25 (Act to modernize legislative provisions as regards the protection of personal information). This policy describes the information we collect, how we use it, and your rights.

dataCollected.title: 1. Information Collected
dataCollected.content:
We collect the following information:

• First and last name (contact form and brief)
• Email address (contact form and brief)
• Company name (optional)
• Phone number (brief)
• Mailing address (brief)
• Message content and project descriptions
• Anonymized browsing data (Vercel Analytics)

purposes.title: 2. Processing Purposes
purposes.content:
Your information is used exclusively to:

• Respond to your contact requests
• Prepare service proposals
• Improve our website (anonymized data)
• Comply with our legal obligations

cookies.title: 3. Cookies
cookies.content:
Our site uses cookies in three categories:

• Essential: required for the site to function (language preferences, cookie consent). Cannot be disabled.
• Analytics: Vercel Analytics to understand site usage. Anonymized data, no personal information transmitted.
• Marketing: no marketing cookies are currently used.

You can manage your preferences via the consent banner displayed on your first visit. Your consent is stored for 6 months.

thirdParties.title: 4. Third-Party Services
thirdParties.content:
We use the following third-party services:

• Formspree (form processing) — data is transmitted to Formspree Inc. for message routing
• Vercel Analytics (anonymized traffic analysis)

No personal data is sold or shared for advertising purposes.

retention.title: 5. Data Retention
retention.content: Personal information is retained for a maximum of 24 months after the last contact, unless a legal obligation requires otherwise. Anonymized analytics data is retained indefinitely.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights (Law 25)
rights.content:
Under Quebec Law 25, you have the right to:

• Access your personal information
• Correct inaccurate information
• Withdraw your consent at any time
• Request deletion of your data
• File a complaint with the Commission d'accès à l'information du Québec (CAI)

To exercise these rights, contact our privacy officer.

contact.title: 7. Privacy Officer
contact.content:
Marc-Antoine Bherer
Privacy Officer
Email: privacy@marksystems.ca

Mark Systems
Quebec, QC, Canada
